body:
## Summary
- Adds exported-web coverage that clicks Search practice-question results from `/search?q=riksdag` and `/search?query=kommun`.
- Verifies the routed quiz URL, localized question heading, and source citation context match the clicked result.
- Consolidates a duplicate `app/sources.tsx` import so the branch stays lint-clean.

## Validation
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npm run lint`
- `npm run test:ownership`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check app/sources.tsx tests/e2e/search-query-hydration.spec.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD^..HEAD`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 E2E_PORT=4191 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/search-query-hydration.spec.ts tests/e2e/search-accessibility.spec.ts --workers=1`
title: test: cover search result quiz navigation
